trivia_bullets.text: White-blue Enchantment uncommon (MKM, no. 157, February 9, 2024). Triggers when creature cards leave graveyard: creates 2/2 Detective token then Investigates (produces Clue artifact).

"In your search for a suspect, never forget that the most important person is the victim." — Ezrim, Agency chief. Ezrim is a guildless Archon and head of the Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations; former Azorius senator who broke away to found a minimal-fee truth-seeking organization.
sources: magic.wizards.com: The Legends and Characters of MKM

trivia_bullets.text: Self-reinforcing loop: dead creatures become Detective investigators who create Clue tokens ({2}, sacrifice: draw a card). Particularly potent with board wipes or self-sacrifice engines in Commander.
Ezrim appears as a legendary creature at MKM no. 202 (Ezrim, Agency Chief), making this flavor quote a piece of in-universe dialogue from a named card in the same set.
sources: magic.wizards.com: The Legends and Characters of MKM

related_cards.name: Ezrim, Agency Chief
related_cards.note: source of the flavor quote; legendary Archon leading the Agency

related_cards.name: Alquist Proft, Master Sleuth
related_cards.note: lead detective in the narrative; investigator-faction identity

related_cards.name: Evidence Examiner
related_cards.note: investigate engine; feeds the Clue token ecosystem Chalk Outline creates
